calibration.calibration_note: With hazard_harm=0.02, avg episode ~182 steps (was ~18 with 0.5). Actual episode time higher.

items.title: MECH-269 V_s validation entropy probe -- cascade gate (supersedes EXQ-476)
items.notes: Real implementation of the EXQ-476 cascade gate. EXQ-476 was a stub (NotImplementedError on real run) pending V_s runtime-flag plumbing in REEConfig.from_dims() and clarity on whether Phase-2 alone suffices. Plumbing landed 2026-04-24; this body runs the 2-seed x 2-arm action_class_entropy comparison (OFF vs Phase-1+Phase-2 V_s flags ON). PASS = ON - OFF >= 0.1 in >=2/2 seeds -> V3-EXQ-445d / 449c / 455a unblock. FAIL/INCONCLUSIVE -> MECH-284 Phase-3 staleness-accumulator consumer must land before cascade. experiment_purpose=diagnostic.
